title: Deep Blue Skies
description: Makes the sky a deeper shade of blue that is easier on your eyes. Similar to the sky in Infdev Minecraft.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

Deep Blue Skies makes skies a little bit easier on the eye by making the sky a deeper shade of blue, and does not modify the sunrise or sunset. Was used in old versions of [Chase the Skies](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chase-the-skies) before being removed.

![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/032b3169badbdce870ae6ae179be88f8150e0e9a_0.webp)

Skyboxify
